info.title: Retrieve Incentive Programs API
info.description:
Returns a **list of available incentive programs** applicable to a specified **PIN** (product identification number). The legacy SOAP **Retrieve Valid Incentive Program** operation maps to this REST API; see your **SOAP-to-REST field mapping** and **REST API FAQ** attachments for property-level details.

Support: Warranty_Api_Support@JohnDeere.com

servers.description: Sandbox (cert). Production uses `https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com` — confirm the path prefix under `/digcust/wy/` and whether the `cert` segment is present for your environment.

OAuth2.description: John Deere Dealer Solutions OAuth 2.0. Use the **authorization code** flow (three-legged) for interactive users, or the **client credentials** grant for machine-to-machine access. Request the OAuth scope assigned to your application for this API (this reference uses `warranty` as an example — confirm the scope in your Developer.Deere.com application and technical documentation).

IncProgHeader.description: Incentive program header entity returned from **IncProgHeaderSet**. The exact properties depend on the OData contract and your SOAP-to-REST mapping; additional fields may appear.

dealer.description: Dealer identifier used in the lookup key.

pin.description: Product identification number (PIN) used in the lookup key.

repairDate.description: Repair date used in the lookup key (format per service contract).

programId.description: Incentive program identifier when present on the entity.

programName.description: Display name of the incentive program when returned.

message.example: No incentive programs were found for the supplied PIN and repair date.

get.summary: Get incentive programs by dealer, PIN, and repair date
get.description:
Retrieves **Incentive Program** entities from **IncProgHeaderSet** using the OData-style key: **dealer**, **PIN**, and **repair date**.

**Sandbox example:** `GET https://jdws-api-sandbox.deere.com/digcust/wy/cert/WtyDbsRetrIncentiveProg/IncProgHeaderSet(Dealer='550012345',Pin='1A2B3C4D5E6F7890',RepairDate='2026-04-01')`

**Production:** Use the production host (`https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com`) with the path pattern documented for your program (the `cert` segment or application id may differ from sandbox).

**Accept:** `application/json`

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Application or service instance segment for your Dealer Solutions integration (sandbox example: `WtyDbsRetrIncentiveProg`).

parameters.name: Dealer
parameters.description: Dealer identifier in the IncProgHeaderSet key.

parameters.name: Pin
parameters.description: Product identification number (PIN) in the IncProgHeaderSet key.

parameters.name: RepairDate
parameters.description: Repair date in the IncProgHeaderSet key (format per your integration contract).

200.description: Incentive program headers returned for the supplied key.

400.description: Bad request — malformed key or invalid parameters.

error.message: The IncProgHeaderSet key could not be parsed.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid access token.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not include the required scope or organization access.

error.message: Access token is missing the required scope.

404.description: No incentive programs found for the supplied dealer, PIN, and repair date.

error.message: No incentive programs were found for the supplied PIN and repair date.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
